title: Kidplokio Pirate Ship Ocean Adventure Playset, Lights Sounds Action Figures, Red
description:
AHOY MATEY! Hunt treasure and explore the seven seas with this adventure ready toy pirate ship boat and action figure play set toy! With fun lights, interactive sounds, three pirate action figures come to life to play with along with their pirate ship to captain, kids will have a blast sailing, looting, commandeering enemy ships and more, as they sail the briny deep! With the simple push of a button on the front side of the pirate ship, exciting sounds roar from the deck, along with lots of flashing lights. Kids will have hours of entertaining fun, all with no assembly required from parents or family. The pirate ship toy comes with three plastic pirate action figures. Perfect for manning the pirate ship

Kidplokio Pirate Ship Ocean Adventure Playset, Lights Sounds Action Figures, Red

AHOY MATEY! Hunt treasure and explore the seven seas with this adventure ready toy pirate ship boat and action figure play set toy!

With fun lights, interactive sounds, three pirate action figures come to life to play with along with their pirate ship to captain, kids will have a blast sailing, looting, commandeering enemy ships and more, as they sail the briny deep!

Key Features

  • TOY PIRATE SHIP ADVENTURE PLAY SET: Seek out a pirates treasure and explore the ocean with this adventure ready pirate toy boat and action figure set. Kids will have a blast sailing, looting, commandeering as they sail the high seas
  • HOURS OF ENTERTAINMENT: Real working lights and sounds effects, kids will love how these features make playtime more fun, interactive and realistic. With the push of a button, sounds roar from the deck
  • TOY PIRATE ACTION FIGURES: The toy pirate ship play set includes (3) pirate action figures perfect for manning the pirate ship boat; one captain and two pirates will have little hands busy with lots of imaginative pretend play adventure
  • IMAGINATIVE PRETEND PLAY: The possibilities are endless with this toy pirate ship play set! Seeking sunken gold or caught in a high sea’s pirate's war, kids will love creating stories and using their imagination for hours of exciting pirate pretend play!
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 12 x 6 x 9 inches; Material: Plastic; Power: 1.5 volt batteries (included); Color: Red; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: C019080RD
  • UPC: 810058484352
  • Color: Red
  • Size: 11 in

With the simple push of a button on the front side of the pirate ship, exciting sounds roar from the deck, along with lots of flashing lights. Kids will have hours of entertaining fun, all with no assembly required from parents or family.

The pirate ship toy comes with three plastic pirate action figures. Perfect for manning the pirate ship. One captain and two pirates will have little hands busy with lots of pretend play adventure! The imaginative pretend play possibilities are endless with this toy pirate ship! Seeking sunken gold or caught in a high sea’s pirate's war, kids will love creating stories and using their imagination for hours of exciting pirate ship playtime. In addition, this pirate ship toy boat is great for kids and young children's fine and gross motor skills, as they play with the large ship and maneuver the smaller actions figures.

The Pirate Ship Boat toy is great for boys 3 to 8 years old. Play set toy boat operates on (3)1.5 volt batteries which are included.
